name: L-2 fetcher rate-limit gate blocks the fetch when remaining capacity is below the batch size per the 5000/hr ceiling
command: printf '%s' '{"remaining":5}' > rate.json && printf '%s' '' > stub.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetch.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --upstream-stub stub.jsonl --rate-budget-stub rate.json --batch-size 20 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'rate_limit_exceeded' err.txt && grep -q 'remaining=5 needed=20' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
